default.tagline: Master Video Editing, Graphics & AI Visual Creation

hero.title: Create Stunning Visuals with Editing, Graphics & AI
hero.subtitle: Learn video editing, motion graphics, and AI-powered design techniques to build content that stands out. From beginner to advanced workflows, everything you need is here.

preview.title: If you can imagine it, you can create it.
preview.description: Our courses focus on real-world creative workflows — from editing cinematic videos to designing high-quality graphics and using AI tools to speed up your process. Learn by building actual projects, not just theory.

reviews.name: Arjun Nair
reviews.text: I learned professional video editing and started creating content that actually stands out. The AI tools section is a game changer.

reviews.name: Fathima Shirin
reviews.text: Finally understood how to combine design + editing + AI. My freelance income improved a lot after this.

reviews.name: Nikhil Raj
reviews.text: Clear, practical, and straight to the point. Helped me level up my video quality and workflow.
